title: Picioarele nu se construiesc doar mutând greutăți mari. Se construiesc prin execuție controlată, amplitudine, progres și capacitatea de a duce fiecare serie apr
hook: Picioarele nu se construiesc doar mutând greutăți mari. Se construiesc prin execuție controlată, amplitudine, progres și capacitatea de a duce fiecare serie apr
caption:
Picioarele nu se construiesc doar mutând greutăți mari. Se construiesc prin execuție controlată, amplitudine, progres și capacitatea de a duce fiecare serie aproape de limita reală.

Acesta este unul dintre antrenamentele mele preferate: simplu, brutal și extrem de eficient. Hai să îl luăm exercițiu cu exercițiu. 
Nu există exercițiul magic și nici programul care funcționează fără efort. Există însă selecția corectă a exercițiilor, progresie, execuție și intensitate aplicată inteligent.

Antrenamentul meu:

1. Extensii la aparat
2. Pendulum squat
3. Presă înclinată
4. Fandări în mers
5. Sissy

title: PART 1: Stop Doing Only Cardio ❌
hook: PART 1: Stop Doing Only Cardio ❌
caption:
PART 1: Stop Doing Only Cardio ❌

If you’re a woman with 30–40% body fat, doing only cardio is one of the biggest reasons you’re not getting the lean, toned look you want.

Think of it like trying to build a house with only a paintbrush.

You can keep painting the walls, but without a solid foundation, the house never gets stronger.

That’s exactly what happens when you rely only on cardio.

Yes, cardio burns calories.

But strength training is what builds the foundation—the lean muscle that gives your body shape, definition, and helps you keep the fat off long-term.

title: One of my favourite parts of coaching has to be
hook: One of my favourite parts of coaching has to be
caption:
One of my favourite parts of coaching has to be
watching someone's self-belief slowly come back.

Not because belief alone changes anything.
But because it changes how you approach the process.

You keep showing up. You stay curious. You stop chasing perfection.
And over time, those small actions compound into results.

Reading back through Shalini's check-ins, there wasn't one
defining moment where everything suddenly clicked.

It was dozens of small moments:

A better training session.
Sleeping through the night.
Tracking becoming second nature.
Feeling less guilty when life wasn't perfect.

title: Body recomposition is real. 💙
hook: Body recomposition is real. 💙
caption:
Body recomposition is real. 💙

I used to think progress was only about losing weight. Now I understand that it’s also about losing fat, building muscle, and changing the shape of your body.

That’s why progress isn’t always measured by the scale. Sometimes it’s measured by how your clothes fit, how strong you’ve become, and photos like these.

This journey has taught me to focus less on chasing a number and more on becoming the healthiest, strongest version of myself. And yes… these are the same leggings.

The work is working… and I’m just getting started. 💙#BodyRecomposition #FatLoss #GymGirl

Monday - Upper 1:
- Weighted Chins: 65 x 7, 4
- Incline bench: 165 x 5
- T Bar Rows: 145 x 11, 8
- DB Press: 70 x 8
- Pec Deck: 85 x 12, 9

title: Myth: Lifting weights creates new muscle fibers.
hook: Myth: Lifting weights creates new muscle fibers.
caption:
Myth: Lifting weights creates new muscle fibers. 
Science: In adults, muscle growth is hypertrophy, not hyperplasia.

Hypertrophy = Individual muscle fibers increase in cross-sectional area. Driven by myofibrillar protein synthesis exceeding protein breakdown.

Hyperplasia = Increase in fiber number. Demonstrated in animals and during development. In human adults? The evidence is weak and highly controversial.

The 3 scientifically validated mechanisms of hypertrophy: 
1. Mechanical Tension - High-threshold motor unit recruitment + force production. Load matters.  2. Metabolic Stress - Accumul
